ref_contract_no.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

root.sql: SELECT sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , 'dd') as day ,count(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as c_count_mem ,sum(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount) as loan_approve_amount ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ,FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_DESC( FPB_GET_LOAN_TYPE_REF( sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no )) as loan_type_description ,'!year_1!' +543 as req_year ,pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name(('!month_1!')::int,'LT') as req_month_name FROM sc_lon_m_rule, sc_acc_m_account_master, sc_lon_m_contract, sc_com_m_branch ,sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid ,sc_com_m_ucf_money_type ,sc_lon_m_loan_request WHERE ( sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = sc_acc_m_account_master.account_id ) and ( sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type ) and (sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no ) and ( sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '1' ) and ( sc_com_m_branch.branch_id = sc_lon_m_contract.branch_id ) and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.type_pay_money = sc_com_m_ucf_money_type.money_type_id and sc_lon_m_contract_multi_paid.seq_no = 1 and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' /*WHERE*/ and ((to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'yyyy'))::numeric) = '!year_1!' and ((to_char( sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,'mm'))::numeric) = '!month_1!' --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '02/05/2023' --and sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no = 'ฐ' GROUP BY sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no ORDER BY sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract ASC ,sc_lon_m_rule.ref_contract_no asc
